column1: # encoder: libjpeg-turbo 2.1.2 /usr/bin/cjpeg -quality Q  (default 4:2:0 baseline, integer DCT) -- REAL libjpeg-turbo, not a proxy

# metric tools (all REAL tool outputs, no estimates): fast-ssim2 0.8.2 (ssim2) | butteraugli 0.9.2 (butter_max + butter_pnorm3, pnorm3 = libjxl 3-norm) | cvvdp 0.1.0 / cvvdp-gpu 0.0.1 via CubeCL CUDA, standard_4k display (cvvdp, JOD 0-10) | zensim 0.3.0 ZensimProfile::A = latest_preview, bake v47-strict-QAT-native 2026-05-27 (zensim, identity=97.69)
# corpus (REAL, named, non-Kodak/non-gradient): 85 source images x 20 Q (5..100 step 5) = 1700 measured cells.
#   photo  = CID22-512 (50 imgs)  |  screen = gb82-sc + imazen-26-screenshots (17 imgs)  |  lineart = sci-figures-color NASA/NIST figures (18 imgs)

# method: per source, encode all Q with cjpeg, decode+score 4 metrics in one `zenmetrics compare` call (ref decoded once). MINED ssim2/butter cross-check from oracle-d2 (mozjpeg-rs-420-e2, 54k JPEG encodings, butter=MAX norm).
# columns: median values; q25/q75 columns give the inter-quartile spread across the corpus at that operating point.
# all metrics monotone in quality -> cross-mappings invertible within sampling noise. Correspondences are CONTENT-DEPENDENT (see content_class rows).
